headline: Micron Expands AI Ecosystem With Edge Partner And New York Megafab Plans
summary: Micron Technology (NasdaqGS:MU) has invested in SiMa.ai to expand its role in edge AI for robotics, autonomous systems, and industrial uses. The company also outlined a $35.5m community investment in New York tied to its planned megafab project in Clay, NY. Both moves reflect Micron's efforts to build an AI focused ecosystem around its memory and storage products. Micron Technology, trading at $406.73, has had very large share price gains over the past year, with a 1 year return of 482.0%...
